Free Financial Planning Tools

Make smarter decisions with your money. Calculate monthly EMIs, estimate interest savings, and plan your journey to becoming completely debt-free.

Most Popular

EMI Calculator

Calculate your monthly payments (EMIs), track principal vs interest shares, and generate full amortization schedule tables.

Highly Useful

Loan & Prepayment Saver

Find out how much interest you can save and how many months you can shave off by making extra payments or prepayments.

Highly Advanced

EMI vs. SIP Calculator

Compare whether it is mathematically wiser to prepay your loan or invest your monthly surplus in a mutual fund SIP.

Smart AI

AI Financial Guide

Struggling with debt? Ask our interactive AI helper about snowball, avalanche, and other smart loan strategies.

New Release

Loan Closure Checklist

Get a step-by-step checklist of legal documents (NOC, NDC, hypothecation removal) to collect from banks upon loan closure.

100% Private & Anonymous

Our calculators run entirely inside your browser. No personal details, amounts, or financial data are ever stored or sent to any server. Explore freely!

Need more advanced features?

Create a free account to import your actual loans, sync outstanding balances, build custom payment strategies, and extract loan documents with AI.
